title: Nautical Ranks
description: A resource pack for Minecraft Java and Bedrock that adds custom ranks while being GeyserMC compatible.
body:
#  Nautical Ranks

A resource pack for Minecraft Java and Bedrock that adds custom ranks like Better Ranks for ItemsAdder. This pack is a better option becuase it works with GeyserMC and all the ranks are free and easy to download. There is no need for a plugin, just a resource pack.

## Key Features

- GeyserMC Compatible
- No dependencies needed
- Java & Bedrock pack downloads (Bedrock pack downloads **not** on Modrinth)

## Ranks
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/B6zn02n0/IMG-20240406-231129.jpg)

## Java Pack Download
```bash
resource-pack=https://nauticalhosting.org/Nautical-Ranks-V2-JAVA.zip
```
```bash
resource-pack-sha1=23ca51f727bd9c29754d802900b3e38bc555411b
```
